name: Michael T.
review: Absolutely brilliant tool. My PC boots at least 30 seconds faster since I disabled all the bloatware from startup. The real-time performance monitor is super useful too.

name: Sarah K.
review: Finally a free optimizer that doesn't bundle adware or try to upsell you every 5 minutes. Does exactly what it says and the UI looks great.
reply: Thank you for the kind words, Sarah! We will never bundle anything — free forever.

name: Dave R.
review: Works great overall. Would love to see a scheduled clean option added in a future version. The junk cleaner alone freed up 4GB on my drive.
reply: Scheduled cleaning is on our roadmap — thanks for the suggestion, Dave!

name: Anonymous
review: Solid software. Clean interface and no nonsense. Exactly what I was looking for.
